content: My new baby is coming next month, I want to add her to the health insurance plan

Congratulations on your upcoming baby! I can simulate adding your new baby to your health insurance plan. I will need some information to proceed. Please remember that I am only simulating the process, and no actual changes will be made to your HR records.

First, could you please provide the following details?

*   What will be your baby's first and last name?
*   What is the expected date of birth?

Once I have this information, I can simulate the process of adding your baby to your health insurance.
